coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 7-group, 147-node closure.
validation: Seven Blender/VM cases have exact topology and local bounds. The supplied file has no object or G-code assigned to Select Object to Print, so its slice, layer, scale, translation, and rotation inputs are Blender no-ops and are intentionally not exposed. All 95 faces retain the build plate assignment. The active material output is a Color chain fed by a missing 0 x 0 logo_600x600_crop_center.webp image, which Blender renders black; the browser now preserves that observable fallback without inventing artwork. The missing Archivo SemiBold font does not affect this authored bed-only result.

material.name: build plate
material.contract: Missing Image Texture -> Hue/Saturation -> Brightness/Contrast -> Color Surface
material.scope: Viewport material parity only; no slicer or G-code toolpath is present.
